name: SEC EDGAR Company Facts XBRL API
description: US/ADR-listed airport operators' financial data via SEC EDGAR XBRL structured data. No auth required — User-Agent header only.
rate_limit_note: Throttle to ~10 req/s max. Polite User-Agent required.

CAAP_CORPORACION_AMERICA.note: Covers 50+ airports across Argentina, Brazil, Uruguay, Ecuador, Italy, Armenia. 352 IFRS concepts.
